PDOException PDOException QueryException

HTTP 500 Internal Server Error

SQLSTATE[HY000] [2002] Cannot connect to MySQL using SSL (Connection: mysql, SQL: select `value`, `key` from `school_profiles`)

Exceptions 3

Illuminate\Database\ QueryException
